## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (lint + build)
- [ ] Tests pass (`make test-unit` or `make test`)
- [ ] Coverage is maintained (≥80% for changed packages)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars were added
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
